content:
We have 20 members total (10 boys and 10 girls).

We want to choose a president and a vice-president, with the restriction that the same person cannot hold both positions.

- Number of ways to choose the president = 20 (any one of the 20 members)
- After choosing the president, number of ways to choose the vice-president = 19 (any one of the remaining 19 members)

Total number of ways = 20 × 19 = 380

So the answer is **380**, which corresponds to option (A).
